lotteryDescription: In the heart of Downtown Brooklyn, 104 Fleet Place is a modern mid-rise residential building offering both comfort and style, featuring contemporary layouts and expansive windows that fill each home with natural light. The building is primarily located, with immediate access to transit options, local dining, parks, and cultural attractions. Residents enjoy access to a thoughtfully curated collection of amenities*, including private parking*, a fully equipped fitness center*, a media lounge*, a children’s play area*, and modern co-working spaces*, along with additional recreational offerings designed for convenience and lifestyle. A dedicated wellness experience is also available at the spa retreat*, which includes a swimming pool* and jacuzzi*, offering a calm escape. (*fees apply) 2 pets allowed up to 60lb. Breed restrictions apply. Tenants are responsible for electricity, including stove and heat. Rent includes hot water.

lotteryDescription:
Welcome to 269 Van Cortlandt Avenue East Apartments! 
This newly constructed building features studios, 1-bedroom, and 3-bedroom affordable apartments with contemporary layouts. Each unit is designed with comfort and convenience in mind, making it ideal for families seeking quality city living. 
Stepping through the door carries a deep feeling of comfort and home.
No pets are allowed in this building; service animals are an exception. 
Tenant is responsible for electricity, including the electric stove, and heat. Hot water is included in the rent.

lotteryDescription:
Rialto West is a newly constructed mixed-income rental building in Hell’s Kitchen offering studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Located near public transit, dining, and shopping, the property features a fitness room, laundry room, broadband internet access, and a pet-friendly policy (restrictions apply; 40 lb. maximum). The building includes a ground-floor arts and community space operated separately by IndieSpace. The space is intended for public-facing arts/community use and is not a residential amenity or exclusive resident space. The building is also located next to a new public open space. Tenants are responsible for electricity. Manhattan Community Board 4 preference applies.
 
To request an application by mail, send a self-addressed, stamped envelope to: Rialto West, c/o Clinton Management, 42-06 235th Street, Douglaston, NY 11363.

lotteryDescription:
Defined by its striking white façade, 343 Himrod Street offers contemporary residences in the heart of Bushwick, a neighborhood known for its artistic identity, industrial charm, and its growing collection of acclaimed restaurants, cafés, and cultural venues. The thoughtfully designed two-bedroom residences feature modern finishes, spacious layouts, and carefully curated details that balance style and comfort. Residents can enjoy an array of amenities, including a state-of-the-art fitness center*, resident workspace*, game room*, and a beautifully appointed sundeck*, creating inviting spaces to work, unwind, and connect with neighbors (*Fees may apply).
 One pet is allowed, up to 30 lbs. Tenant is responsible for electricity, including stove and heat. Rent includes hot water.

Each home features clean, contemporary finishes, open layouts, and oversized windows that fill the interiors with natural light, creating inviting spaces where everyday living feels elevated. Located in one of Brooklyn’s most vibrant neighborhoods, residents enjoy immediate access to transit, dining, shopping, parks, and cultural destinations. lotteryName: 223 East 117th Street aka PETER JAY SHARP RESIDENCE
lotteryDescription:
This is Lottery to fill 7 current vacant units; eligible applicants will be placed on the list for future vacancies.
Tenant is responsible for electric. Landlord responsible for heat and hot water.

Welcome to 2351 Lorillard Place Apartments, an upscale residential experience in the vibrant Belmont neighborhood of the Bronx. This newly constructed 9-story building blends modern design with elevated comfort, offering spacious one-, two-, and three-bedroom residences with stylish finishes and thoughtfully crafted layouts. Residents enjoy contemporary amenities, refined interiors, and convenient access to neighborhood dining, shopping, parks, and public transportation. With its sophisticated design and prime location, 2351 Lorillard Place offers a premium living experience in one of the Bronx’s most dynamic communities. One pet allowed -30lb. weight limit per pet & some additional restrictions. No pet deposit required. Tenant is responsible for electricity with electric stove and electric heat. Hot water is included in the rent.

lotteryDescription:
Experience the height of modern city living at 163 Willoughby Street, where the building welcomes you with a sense of refined calm and modern design. Each home features sleek, high-end kitchen appliances and premium finishes, thoughtfully designed for everyday life. Living here provides access to  a curated collection of premier amenities. These include private parking*, a well-outfitted fitness center*, a game room*, a media lounge*, a kids’ playground*, and sophisticated co-working spaces*, along with a wide range of additional recreational offerings*. Residents can unwind and rejuvenate in the in-house spa retreat*, featuring a tranquil pool* and jacuzzi*. Embrace a more active lifestyle with amenities such as a rock-climbing wall* and a pickleball court*, all available in your residence. (*fees apply). 2 pets allowed up to 60 lbs. Breed restrictions apply. Service animals are an exception. 
Tenants are responsible for electricity, including stove and heat. Rent includes hot water.

lotteryDescription: Nevins Landing South is part of Gowanus Wharf’s growing waterfront campus in the heart of Gowanus, Brooklyn. Located along the Gowanus Canal Esplanade between the Carroll Street and Union Street Bridges, the building blends modern industrial design with the neighborhood’s creative energy and evolving waterfront landscape. Residences feature open-concept layouts, thoughtfully designed interiors, high-end appliances, and contemporary finishes designed for modern Brooklyn living. Residents enjoy access to a collection of lifestyle amenities, including a fitness center*, resident lounges*, recreation rooms*, grilling areas*, and additional social and wellness spaces throughout the building. Conveniently located near local restaurants, parks, nightlife, and transit, Nevins Landing South offers a connected living experience within one of Brooklyn’s fastest-growing neighborhoods. Fees apply. Up to 2 pets. No aggressive breeds. Rent includes electricity for stove, hot water, and heat.

apartments.

Jamaica Central, a luxury residential building in the vibrant Jamaica neighborhood. The development offers spacious three-bedroom residences, thoughtfully designed for comfort and everyday functionality, featuring quality finishes and well-planned layouts suited for families, professionals, and individuals. Tenants have access to a modern-designed fitness center*, business center*, and rooftop terrace* (*fees apply). Conveniently situated near shopping, dining, grocery stores, schools, parks, and community services along Jamaica Avenue, Jamaica Central also provides easy access to public transportation, making commuting simple and convenient. One pet is permitted per household (maximum 25 lbs.; non-aggressive breeds only, exception for service animals. Tenant is responsible for electricity, including stove, hot water, and heat.

lotteryDescription:
The Longwood and Morrisania sections of the Bronx offer a residential neighborhood setting with convenient access to local businesses, public transportation, schools, parks, and community services. The surrounding area includes a mix of walk-up buildings, multifamily residences, neighborhood retail, and nearby green spaces, making it a practical location for households seeking affordability while remaining connected to the broader Bronx and New York City.
These newly renovated affordable units at 941 Intervale Avenue and 976 Tinton Avenue offer comfortable apartment layouts, with access to nearby transit options and essential neighborhood amenities. This is a Waiting List to fill 6 current vacant units. Eligible applicants will be placed on the list for future vacancies.

Rent includes gas for heating. Tenants are responsible for electricity with an electric stove. 
No pets allowed. Service animals are an exception.

1760 Third Avenue Residence is located in Manhattan's East Harlem neighborhood.  Of its 433 apartments, 172 are affordable to low-income households. The 18-story building features a 24-hour attended lobby, on-site resident manager, elevators, Multi-purpose room, fitness center, computer lab, on-site laundry room. Nearby transit includes the (6)/(Q) subways and M15-SBS, M96, M98, M101, M102, M103 busses. All utilities, including electricity, including for electric stove; heating and hot water are included in the rent.

lotteryDescription:
Discover modern waterfront living at Columbia Commons I in the heart of Red Hook, Brooklyn. This striking residential community brings together affordability, comfort, and neighborhood charm with 239 thoughtfully designed affordable apartments. With easy access to public transportation, parks, dining, and entertainment, this project is perfect for those seeking an urban lifestyle without compromising on affordability. Amenities include a security guard, outdoor terrace, community room, and much more!
Tenant is responsible for electricity, which includes an electric stove.

No pets are allowed with the exception of service pets.

lotteryDescription: Starhill Phase II is a 169-unit newly constructed residential building located at 51 Featherbed Lane in the Morris Heights section of the Bronx Community Board 5. The development consists of units ranging from studios to 3-bedrooms. The amenities include on-site superintendent, elevator, accessible entrance, energy-efficient appliances, free in-unit broadband Wi-Fi, security cameras, intercommunication device, resident lounge, rear yard, landscaped terrace, *card operated communal laundry room (*Additional Fees Apply). Tenants are responsible for electricity including electric stove. Heat and hot water are included in the rent and paid by owner. The building is accessible through public transportation, including the 4 train and the Bx3, 18A, 18B, and 36 busses. With restaurants, shopping areas and parks within walking distance, Starhill Phase II offers everything you need for modern city living.
